assignments.name: keywords
assignments.value: ableton fat sound, launch control xl mapping, max for live performance

assignments.name: ruleKeywords
assignments.value: how,wish,problem,doesn't,dont,can you,is there,anyone,help,crash,bug,how do i,any way

assignments.name: aiCriteria
assignments.value: The comment expresses a pain point, a question, a feature request, or frustration about controlling Ableton Live with a MIDI controller, mapping macros, or a live-performance workflow.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-haiku-4-5", max_tokens: 200, messages: [ { role: "user", content: "You screen YouTube comments for audience research.

CRITERION: " + $('Config').first().json.aiCriteria + "

COMMENT: "" + ($json.text || '') + ""

Return ONLY compact JSON, no prose: {"match": true|false, "category": "pain|question|feature_request|competitor|other", "reason": "<=12 words"}" } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ parent: { database_id: $('Config').first().json.notionDbId }, properties: { "Comment": { title: [ { text: { content: ($json.text || '').slice(0, 1900) } } ] }, "Author": { rich_text: [ { text: { content: $json.author || '' } } ] }, "Category": { select: { name: $json.category || 'other' } }, "Reason": { rich_text: [ { text: { content: $json.reason || '' } } ] }, "Likes": { number: $json.likeCount || 0 }, "Replies": { number: $json.replyCount || 0 }, "Video": { rich_text: [ { text: { content: $json.videoTitle || '' } } ] }, "URL": { url: $json.url || null }, "Query": { rich_text: [ { text: { content: $json.query || '' } } ] }, "Published": { date: { start: $json.publishedAt || null } } } }) }}
